steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The given equation is $7x+35=84$. The question asks for the value of $x+5$.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Factor $7$ from the left side:$$7(x+5)=84$$Divide both sides by $7$:$$x+5=12$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to match the computed result to the answer choices. The value or equation found above matches the correct answer, 12. The other choices do not satisfy the same condition from the question, so B is correct.
